name: PHASE-36 C2 (RED): with active project 'phase36_a', fs.write_file into another project's dir MUST be DENIED SCOPE_CROSS_PROJECT
_phase36_red: Asserts the SECURE behavior so it FAILS now. Gap: checkScope is prefix-scoped, not project-scoped — any path under artifacts/projects/ is allowed, so the active project can overwrite a different project's files. Active project is supplied via ctx.active_project_id (test-infra passthrough); PROMPT-B must enforce a cross-project deny AND thread the active project onto the real write path (conversationEngine + materializer pass only { root } today — see decision artifact §C2 real-path note). Executes (not preview) to prove the cross-project write actually lands; the .keep fixture registers artifacts/projects/phase36_b for harness cleanup so nothing leaks. Probe evidence: permissionRules.js:142-150 (artifacts/ prefix → WORKSPACE_WRITE allowed, no active-project comparison).
